plan_summary.primary_goal: Secure ICANN delegation of the .mars gTLD into the DNS root zone by 2027-11-02 under the Builder's Pragmatic Infrastructure Leadership scenario, on a $25–100M+ budget, with internal HSM custody and a validated 100 kbps Mars MOS.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the Year-1 registration-volume margin against the 5,000-domain break-even threshold; the ICANN delegation timing margin against the 18-month deadline; the budget surplus against bottom-up Year-1 cost; the Mars MOS margin against the 100 kbps sustained-downlink requirement; and the HSM-CapEx adequacy margin against the $5M minimum sovereignty floor. ICANN application approval, major space-agency endorsement, and string-contention resolution are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: High-end budget envelope
key_values.comment: Upper bound of the $25–100M+ Builder envelope; absorbs string-contention contingency ($10–20M), HSM CapEx ($5M+), and OpEx through ICANN delegation.
key_values.source_text: High-end budget envelope: USD 25M–100M or more — input to financial projection model.

key_values.label: ICANN delegation deadline
key_values.comment: Target delegation into the DNS root by 2027-11-02 (18 months from start); slippage past this triggers Risk 1/5 political-cost and Risk 3 financial-strain cascades.
key_values.source_text: Within 18 months of project start (Target Completion: 2027-November-02).

key_values.label: Year-1 break-even registration volume threshold
key_values.comment: Issue 2 names 5,000 domains as the Year-1 break-even floor at $50/domain; below this the 50% revenue pledge converts to a fixed annual contribution.
key_values.source_text: Required Year 1 registration volume to cover base overhead: 5,000 registrations — trigger for environmental pledge suspension.

key_values.label: Mars Minimum Operational Specification
key_values.comment: Sustained downlink floor required from Mars synchronization endpoints; below this the 60-minute freshness window cannot hold and Beta-Tier restriction policy activates.
key_values.source_text: Minimum sustained downlink bandwidth required from Mars endpoints: 100kbps.

key_values.label: Minimum HSM-procurement CapEx for cryptographic sovereignty
key_values.comment: Issue 3 names $5M+ as mandatory floor for internal FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM procurement; below this Decision-4 external KSK delegation persists.
key_values.source_text: Cost to procure internal Hardware Security Modules: $5M+ — mandatory capital expenditure for security sovereignty.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Year-1 .mars domain registration volume
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 5,000-domain break-even floor clears at the $50/domain assumption; Issue 2 sensitivity: 3,000 domains yields only $150k net revenue against $25M+ overhead.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor on ICANN historical new-gTLD adoption curves × Mars-specific demand from space-industry entities + speculative early registrations; sensitivity to defensive trademark purchases.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved months from start to ICANN root-zone delegation
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the 18-month deadline keeps the political-cost cascade dormant; above triggers Risk 1 (6–12 mo, $5–10M) and Risk 5 (3–6 mo, $2–4M) delay scenarios.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum application + ICANN review + objection-response + technical conformance windows; sensitivity to GAC early-warning outcomes and string-contention auctions.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Bottom-up Year-1 total cost including HSM CapEx and contingency
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the $100M ceiling absorbs $25M base overhead + $5–10M HSM CapEx + $10–20M contingency + political-outreach overhead.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: 5 FTE × loaded rate × 18 months + ICANN fees + legal/political outreach + HSM + DNSSEC outsourcing + Tier-1 cloud; sensitivity to Risk 3 cost-overrun scenarios.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved sustained Mars endpoint downlink
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Issue 1 sensitivity: 95% availability nullifies the 60-minute sync window; below the 100 kbps MOS the High-Freshness tier cannot launch as planned.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Model relay-network capacity for first-five Mars users × dust-storm-adjusted uptime; benchmark against Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter and projected commercial relay throughput.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved HSM-procurement CapEx
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Issue 3 names a $5M+ floor for FIPS 140-2 Level 3 sovereign key custody; below this the external-KSK-delegation political risk persists.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Quotation from FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSM vendors (Thales, Entrust, etc.) + secure-facility build + 12-month training; cross-check against Issue 3's $5–10M envelope.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year-1 registration-volume margin against the 5,000-domain break-even floor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin clears the Issue-2 break-even floor and keeps the 50% revenue pledge intact; negative margin forces conversion of the pledge to a fixed annual contribution and shrinks the Mars environmental commitment.

recommended_first_calculations.label: ICANN delegation timing margin against the 18-month deadline
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin secures first-mover advantage in interplanetary digital governance; negative margin triggers Risk 1/5 political-cost cascade and Risk 3 cost-overrun pressure on the budget envelope.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Year-1 budget surplus against the $100M envelope
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus preserves the contingency reserve for string-contention auctions and extended political negotiation; negative surplus triggers Risk-3 cost-overrun austerity that cuts political outreach or HSM procurement.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Mars MOS margin against the 100 kbps requirement
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin validates the 60-minute synchronization tier; negative margin forces the Beta-Tier restriction policy and the 15–25% Year-1 ROI loss flagged by Issue 1.

recommended_first_calculations.label: HSM-CapEx adequacy margin against the $5M sovereignty floor
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin secures internal KSK custody and aligns with Issue-3 political-risk mitigation; negative margin leaves Decision-4 external delegation in place and exposes the project to the 9–15 month ICANN-delay scenario.

unmodelled_gates.label: ICANN approves the .mars gTLD application via the New gTLD Program
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: ICANN approval is the binary delegation event; without it the entire project's commercial premise collapses regardless of any operational margin the model evaluates.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: All Year-1 capital and political-outreach spending becomes sunk cost; first-mover advantage forfeited; the Builder strategy thesis fails entirely.

unmodelled_gates.label: At least two major space agencies provide non-objection / observer support
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 1/5 names sovereign objection as the High/High blocking risk; without two major-agency endorsements the ICANN review panel faces unmitigated political controversy regardless of technical compliance.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: 6–12 month delay per Risk 1 + $5–10M extra lobbying cost; ICANN may withhold delegation pending consensus that cannot be manufactured under the Builder strategy timeline.

unmodelled_gates.label: No competing .mars gTLD application reaches private-auction stage or contention resolves favourably
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 3 names $10–20M as the contingency for string-contention defense; an aggressive competing applicant could trigger a private auction far above the contingency ceiling, exhausting the entire $100M envelope without delegation.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Contingency drawdown beyond $20M; project must choose between auction exit (forfeiting strategy) or capital call to defend; either path threatens delegation timing and Year-1 budget surplus.
